description: Firm CRO Morning Brief - reads firm-risk-board + hedge-planner + tail-hedge, assembles a structured CRO morning note (posture + overnight change, binding constraint, hedge ticket, alerts, top risks) and pushes it to Telegram. data/cro-digest.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Firm CRO Morning Brief - daily 12:15 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after the overnight risk stack and the 05:00 UTC Hedge Execution Planner, so the brief reflects a fully refreshed stack.
